overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action-adventure game showing a character exploring snowy coastal ruins during blue hour. The character approaches a stone building, enters through a draped doorway, and explores an abandoned interior containing a large wooden water wheel.

dark silhouette of trees against the blue hour sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a snowy coastal landscape during blue hour, approaching a large stone ruin on the right. A lit brazier burns in the distance, casting orange light on the snow, while dark forest silhouettes line the left horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone entrance stairs and draped doorway

passing through cloth-draped doorway into darker interior space

doorway covered with draped fabric and ropes

segments.scene_description: The character ascends stone stairs into the ruin's entrance, passing through a cloth-draped doorway. The environment transitions from open snow to a sheltered stone corridor, with the lit brazier now visible through the entrance to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned water mill interior with broken roof

events.description: discovering large wooden water wheel inside the dark ruin

agents.ego_description: exploring the dark interior, circling the large wooden water wheel and examining the broken structure

collapsed wooden roof beams with gaps showing the blue sky
multiple window openings with wooden frames looking out to water
green leafy plants growing on the interior floor near the walls

segments.scene_description: Inside the ruin, the character explores a dark chamber containing a massive wooden water wheel. The roof is partially collapsed with broken beams, and windows reveal the coastal water outside. The character moves around the wheel, examining the overgrown interior before heading back toward the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cold, open coastal landscape into the sheltered, decaying interior of a stone ruin. It begins with the character walking through a snowy expanse during the blue hour, passing dark forest silhouettes as they approach a large stone structure marked by a distant, glowing brazier. As the character ascends stone stairs, the scene shifts from the open air into a sheltered corridor, passing through a cloth-draped doorway that leaves the orange light of the brazier behind. The camera then enters a dark, cavernous chamber where the environment opens up to reveal a massive wooden water wheel beneath a partially collapsed roof of broken beams. Finally, the view pans across the overgrown interior and coastal windows before turning back toward the entrance.
